name: UniMart Sprint 1 — Workshop Findings Aggregator
description: US-01: When an empathy map is saved as complete in Supabase, this workflow triggers, formats the findings, and appends them to the project wiki (Notion or a Supabase wiki_entries table). Also flags if fewer than 3 pain points are captured.

nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook: Empathy Map Saved
nodes._comment: Trigger URL: POST https://YOUR_N8N_INSTANCE/webhook/unimart-empathy-map-saved. Call this from your Lovable EmpathyMapDashboard.jsx saveMap() function after a successful Supabase upsert.

parameters.text: ⚠️ *UniMart HCD Alert* — Empathy map for *{{ $json.userGroup }}* was marked complete but only has {{ $json.painPointCount }}/3 minimum pain points. Please add more before Sprint 1 Review. (DoD requires ≥3 per group.)
✅ *Empathy map saved* for *{{ $json.userGroup }}* ({{ $json.painPointCount }} pain points captured). Added to project wiki. Pending PM review.
🎉 *UniMart Sprint 1 Milestone* — All 11 empathy maps complete! US-01 Acceptance Criteria met. Ready for stakeholder sign-off in Sprint 1 Review. @channel

_meta.webhook_integration: In EmpathyMapDashboard.jsx, after the Supabase upsert succeeds, add: await fetch('YOUR_N8N_WEBHOOK_URL', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ user_group: selectedGroup, is_complete: isComplete(mapData), map_data: mapData }) });
_meta.supabase_extra_table: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.wiki_entries (id uuid primary key default uuid_generate_v4(), title text, user_group text, sprint integer, entry_type text, content text, pain_point_count integer default 0, meets_min_criteria boolean default false, is_approved boolean default false, created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now());
